_comment: OMNI-AGENT v2 demo query catalog. Each query exercises a distinct cross-app combination + showcases a Kamiwaza feature where applicable. The agent decomposes the query, fans out to the listed expected_tools, and synthesizes the fused brief.

queries.label: Cross-domain MEDLOG (sensitive routing)
queries.narrator: Blood readiness x typhoon risk x sustainment node impact x sensitive routing.
queries.prompt: What's our blood readiness in INDOPACOM right now, and are any spokes affected by typhoons in the next 72h? Treat as CUI: route through the Inference Mesh. If yes, draft a Commander's MEDLOG OPORD recommending action.

queries.label: Counter-UAS posture (Pendleton 7-day)
queries.narrator: C-UAS classification fused with installation ICOP + weather window.
queries.prompt: Forecast counter-UAS posture for MCB Camp Pendleton next 7 days. Tell me what to brief the base CO.

queries.label: 31st MEU EABO sustainment (Itbayat 30d)
queries.narrator: Full EABO sustainment plan: contested-log + consumption + reorder + medical.
queries.prompt: Plan the full sustainment for 31st MEU EABO at Itbayat for the next 30 days. Cover Class I-IX, Class VIII medical, and call out reorder triggers.

queries.label: Daily ASIB (All-Source Intel Brief)
queries.narrator: All-source intel fusion across HUMINT/SIGINT/IMINT/OSINT clusters.
queries.prompt: Generate today's All-Source Intel Brief for INDOPACOM AOR. Pull from AIS, MARSEC patrols, ISR detections, and FIRMS. Last 24 hours.

queries.label: 1st Bn 8th Marines training readiness
queries.narrator: Training readiness across LMS + schoolhouse + cadence assessments.
queries.prompt: Assess training readiness of 1st Bn 8th Marines. Where are competency gaps and which Marines need a remedial plan?

queries.label: Cost-conscious model routing
queries.narrator: Pick the right model per task in a multi-step workflow under a cost budget.
queries.prompt: I have a MEDLOG OPORD workflow with 4 steps (classify, summarize, narrative, redact). Route every step through the Kamiwaza model catalog under best-quality mode and show me the decisions, costs, and audit chain.

queries.label: TCCC casualty triage (with photo)
queries.narrator: Marine medic triage on a casualty photo + ICOP posture for evacuation.
queries.prompt: Run TCCC triage on this casualty photo from MCB Camp Pendleton range. Tell me the 9-line MEDEVAC and confirm med corridor is clear via ICOP.

queries.label: CUI document review + ReBAC release
queries.narrator: CUI auto-tag + ReBAC walk to decide if LCpl Smith can release the doc.
queries.prompt: Can LCpl J. Smith (S-2 enlisted, SECRET clearance, NOFORN/REL TO USA, GBR) release this attached document to a UK liaison? Auto-tag CUI portions and walk the ReBAC graph.

queries.label: PCS combined travel + cargo
queries.narrator: End-to-end PCS: travel itinerary + voucher pre-validation + HHG tracking.
queries.prompt: MGySgt R. Garcia is PCSing from MCB Quantico to MCB Camp Pendleton. Plan the travel itinerary, pre-validate the DTS voucher, and track the HHG container.

queries.label: Compute-at-data (50 GB GCSS-MC scan)
queries.narrator: Big-data RAG: scan 50 GB of GCSS-MC for M1A1 transmission risk WITHOUT moving data.
queries.prompt: Scan 50 GB of GCSS-MC maintenance reports across Albany, Pendleton, and Tobyhanna nodes for M1A1 transmission risk indicators in the last 90 days. Use compute-at-data — do not pull the corpus back to HQ.

queries.label: Federated RAG across silos
queries.narrator: Federated RAG over Albany/Pendleton/Philly silos, sensitivity-routed.
queries.prompt: Pull the consolidated picture on alternator MTVR (NSN 2920-01-XXX-1234) shortfalls across Albany, Pendleton, Philly, and Tobyhanna silos. Treat as CUI — route through the Inference Mesh.

queries.label: Pallet count from aerial photo
queries.narrator: Vision-quantification of pallets staged at Apra Harbor, fed into reorder.
queries.prompt: Count the pallets visible in this aerial photo of Apra Harbor staging yard. Tell me if it matches our expected 30-day MEU pull from REORDER.
